title: Kuwait Accuses Iran of Trying to Infiltrate Its Territory
summary_full: Kuwait’s interior ministry said a group of armed Iranians arrived at Bubiyan Island in the Persian Gulf on May 1 aboard a rented fishing boat and exchanged fire with Kuwaiti soldiers.
summary_public: Kuwait’s interior ministry said a group of armed Iranians arrived at Bubiyan Island in the Persian Gulf on May 1 aboard a rented fishing boat and exchanged fire with Kuwaiti soldiers.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Kuwait Accuses Iran of Trying to Infiltrate Its Territory
